data.title: ElfQuest Hidden Years #1-25 27 29 + Holiday Special 30-Issue Lot Warp Graphics
data.description:
ElfQuest Hidden Years ran from 1992 to 1996 as Wendy and Richard Pini expanded the original ElfQuest timeline with new stories set between the panels of the classic series. This is a near-complete run covering issues #1 through 25, plus #27 and #29, along with the scarce #9½ Holiday Special. Two copies of #1 and two copies of #2 are included as a bonus. Issues #26, #28, and #30 are the only gaps.

Stored bagged with individual backing boards by a careful collector. Condition is Very Good to Very Fine across the lot, a solid step above average for a 30-year-old indie title. No major creasing, spine rolls, or cover damage observed.

Series | ElfQuest: Hidden Years
Publisher | Warp Graphics
Issues | #1-25, 27, 29 + #9.5 Holiday Special
Missing | #26, #28, #30
Condition | VG to VF, bagged and boarded
Duplicates | Two copies each of #1 and #2 included

All my listings ship with free shipping for your ease, none of this $30 shipping on a 1 pound item. I price my listings fairly but please feel free to make an offer. Comics are packed securely with cardboard backing to protect against bending in transit.

Sold As Is.
data.condition_field: Near-complete run of ElfQuest Hidden Years (WaRP Graphics, 1992-1996), issues #1-25, 27, 29, and the Holiday Special (#9½). 30 issues total including two copies each of #1 and #2. Missing #26, #28, and #30. All issues individually bagged with backing boards. Condition is Very Good to Very Fine throughout — no major creasing, spine rolls, or cover damage noted.
